query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as no_first_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unsent_no_name
FROM customers
WHERE firstName IS NULL OR firstName = '' OR firstName = 'there';
